metadata.title: Halflight
metadata.description: Melodic trap in F major. Warm piano and Rhodes-like electric-piano lead over half-time trap drums with a sub kick. Intro → A → B (chorus) → A′ → B′ → outro. Structured around the I–iii–vi–IV / vi–IV–I–V contrast, with strings entering for the choruses and resolving to an unaccompanied piano cadence.
